name: Dura Fast 40 Outdoor Pickleballs
description: The Dura Fast 40 is a tournament-grade outdoor ball trusted by competitive players for its true bounce and predictable flight. Pack of 12 balls. The seamless one-piece rotationally molded construction delivers uniform wall thickness and exceptional roundness for consistent play.
care_instructions: Outdoor balls wear faster in extreme heat or cold. Store indoors between sessions. This is a 12-pack — keep spares on hand during competitive play.
